metadata.reference:
S. Ninomiya and S. Adachi. Optical properties of cubic and hexagonal CdSe. J. Appl. Phys. 78, 4681-4689 (1995)
[Calculation script (Python)]
metadata.comments: Hexagonal CdSe. Fit of author's experimental data to a simplified model of the interband transitions (MDF). Ordinary ray (o), room temperature.
